title: Floral differentiation among insular and mainland populations of Weigela coraeensis (Caprifoliaceae)
first_action: Recover full text and extract every floral trait by locality with n and variance
rationale: Exact direct island-mainland floral-comparison title; highest-priority new U3 candidate.

title: Impact of geographical isolation on genetic differentiation in insular and mainland populations of Weigela coraeensis (Caprifoliaceae) on Honshu and the Izu Islands
first_action: Recover sampling map and population structure results; link to floral source only after units are harmonised
rationale: Useful for geographic-history alternatives and matching population units; not itself a floral effect.

title: Floral morphology and pollinator fauna characteristics of island and mainland populations of Ligustrum ovalifolium (Oleaceae)
first_action: Recover original tables and verify island taxon rank and pollinator sampling effort
rationale: Confirms exact DOI and direct comparison design for current B-rank Ligustrum rows.

title: Comparison of floral traits and pollinator assemblages of insular and mainland varieties of Lilium auratum
first_action: Recover taxonomic concept and trait tables; retain separately from within-species primary effects
rationale: Directly relevant but must not be treated as a same-population effect until taxonomy and design are verified.

title: Morphological diversity of Lilium auratum var. platyphyllum in Izu Archipelago, Japan
first_action: Recover island-level morphology and sampling; candidate for U5 only if comparable mainland series is secured
rationale: Potentially supplies island shape variation but no confirmed mainland comparator from metadata alone.

title: Genetic Diversity of Lilium auratum var. platyphyllum Endemic to the Izu Archipelago and its Relationship to a Nearby Population of L. auratum
first_action: Recover taxonomic and population relationship information; use to define comparison scope
rationale: Needed before deciding whether the floral comparison is within species, infraspecific, or between taxa.

title: Comparison of pollination characteristics between the insular shrub Clerodendrum izuinsulare and its widespread congener C. trichotomum
eligibility_before_full_text: pollinator observations and provenance; keep out of U3 geographic meta-analysis
column12: Exact DOI for existing B-rank interspecific comparison; valuable mechanism context, not an independent within-species replicate.

title: Floral morphology and anatomy of Pittosporum tobira (Pittosporaceae)
first_action: Recover trait definitions for photo-scoring protocol; do not count as island response
rationale: High photo availability makes species useful, but the Crossref title alone provides no Izu comparison.

title: Morphological aspects and phylogenetic analyses of pollination systems in the Tylophora-Vincetoxicum complex (Apocynaceae-Asclepiadoideae) in Japan
first_action: Extract taxon-specific effective visitor and floral-access information for functional-group audit
rationale: Useful to replace family-level pollination assignment; not a geographic trait comparison.
